articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Trump says he's sending 5,000 more troops to Poland - NPR
articles.description: President Trump's announcement stirred confusion in Europe following weeks of changing statements from his administration about reducing the American military footprint in Europe.
articles.content: WASHINGTON President Donald Trump on Thursday said the U.S. will send an additional 5,000 troops to Poland, stirring confusion following weeks of changing statements from Trump and his administration… [+4090 chars]

articles.title: Ancient seas get a new T. rex as massive mosasaur emerges from Texas fossils - Phys.org
articles.description: There's a new T. rex in the fossil record, only this one terrorized the ancient seas. New research led by scientists at the American Museum of Natural History, the Perot Museum of Nature and Science in Dallas, and Southern Methodist University uncovers a new,…
